## Why route to AgentFlow instead of doing it in Claude Code directly?

<!--
AgentFlow exists to keep work off the primary context. New tools should
either save tokens, save money, or both. If a tool's work is mostly reasoning
that the primary model would do anyway, it probably belongs in Claude Code.
-->
